caption: A man with a beard and short dark hair is recording in a studio with dark, textured acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. The man has tattoos on his right arm. Throughout the sequence, he is speaking into the microphone while gesturing with his right hand. He begins by resting his hand on his head, then shifts his gaze slightly and continues speaking, eventually moving his hand toward the headband of his headphones. His facial expressions change as he speaks, with his mouth open and eyes shifting. A small, stylized logo is visible on the left chest of his white shirt, but the text is not clearly legible.
